message:
Refactor chrome-ws into library for direct MCP integration

- Create chrome-ws-lib.js with exported functions for CDP operations
- Update MCP server to use library directly instead of spawning processes
- Fix library to handle numeric tab indices properly
- Much faster - no process spawn overhead per operation
- Better error handling with actual Error objects
- Foundation for connection pooling in future

Note: Still debugging extraction timeout - works for list_tabs

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,9 @@
 {
   "permissions": {
     "allow": [
-      "Bash(npm run build)"
+      "Bash(npm run build)",
+      "Bash(../skills/browsing/chrome-ws tabs)",
+      "Bash(../skills/browsing/chrome-ws extract 0 text)"
     ],
     "deny": [],
     "ask": []

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
  * Ultra-lightweight MCP Server for Chrome DevTools Protocol.
  *
  * Provides a single `use_browser` tool with multiple actions for browser control.
- * Auto-starts Chrome when needed. Zero external dependencies beyond MCP SDK.
+ * Auto-starts Chrome when needed. Uses chrome-ws-lib for direct CDP access.
  */
 export {};
 //# sourceMappingURL=index.d.ts.map
